_readme: Epigraph registry for Surviving the Singularity. Injected under chapter titles by `sts.py quotes --apply` (repo chapter files) and `sts.py quotes --apply --file <draft.md>` (compiled drafts). `match` is a case-insensitive regex tested against heading lines (# to ###); first match wins. All quotes verified real; disputed provenance is marked 'attributed' in the author field.

quotes.quote: Buy the ticket, take the ride.
quotes.author: Hunter S. Thompson
quotes.source: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas

quotes.quote: It is far better to grasp the universe as it really is than to persist in delusion, however satisfying and reassuring.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.quote: Within thirty years, we will have the technological means to create superhuman intelligence. Shortly after, the human era will be ended.
quotes.author: Vernor Vinge

quotes.quote: The first ultraintelligent machine is the last invention that man need ever make, provided that the machine is docile enough to tell us how to keep it under control.
quotes.author: I. J. Good
quotes.source: Speculations Concerning the First Ultraintelligent Machine

quotes.quote: Earth is the cradle of humanity, but one cannot live in a cradle forever.
quotes.author: Konstantin Tsiolkovsky

quotes.quote: The universe is not only queerer than we suppose, but queerer than we can suppose.
quotes.author: J. B. S. Haldane

quotes.quote: If your theory is found to be against the Second Law of Thermodynamics I can give you no hope; there is nothing for it but to collapse in deepest humiliation.
quotes.author: Arthur Eddington
quotes.source: The Nature of the Physical World

quotes.quote: The ever accelerating progress of technology … gives the appearance of approaching some essential singularity in the history of the race beyond which human affairs, as we know them, could not continue.
quotes.author: John von Neumann, as recalled by Stanisław Ulam
quotes.source: Bulletin of the American Mathematical Society

quotes.quote: Chance favors only the prepared mind.
quotes.author: Louis Pasteur
quotes.source: lecture at the University of Lille

quotes.quote: When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.
quotes.author: Viktor E. Frankl

quotes.quote: Man is small, and, therefore, small is beautiful.
quotes.author: E. F. Schumacher

quotes.quote: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
quotes.author: Alan Kay

quotes.quote: Give me a place to stand, and I shall move the Earth.
quotes.author: attributed to Archimedes

quotes.quote: Land is the only thing in the world that amounts to anything … 'tis the only thing in this world that lasts.
quotes.author: Margaret Mitchell

quotes.quote: You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.
quotes.author: attributed to R. Buckminster Fuller

quotes.quote: “How did you go bankrupt?” “Two ways. Gradually and then suddenly.”
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.quote: The nation that destroys its soil destroys itself.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Code and media are permissionless leverage. They're the leverage behind the newly rich.
quotes.author: Naval Ravikant

quotes.quote: We are as gods and might as well get good at it.
quotes.author: Stewart Brand

quotes.quote: Plans are worthless, but planning is everything.
quotes.author: Dwight D. Eisenhower
quotes.source: remarks to the National Defense Executive Reserve Conference

quotes.quote: As for the future, your task is not to foresee it, but to enable it.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
